data.name: Throat Goat
data.detailed_description:
TRAIN HER, DATE HER, FUCK HER!

Guide an ambitious furry goat girl through rigorous training as she prepares for a contest to become a world champion in deepthroating. Push her limits and explore a quirky relationship as her performance partner.

ON THE ROAD TO VICTORY!

Join Clara for the legendary Deepthroating Championships. Pay attention to the remaining days as well as her energy and mood as you unlock new scenes. Can she rise above the competition, claim the ultimate title of Throat Goat, and win a trip to Hawaii?

COLLECT SEX SCENES, SELFIES, AND MORE!

Randomized events and dozens of explicit illustrations. You’ll never know what’s waiting around the corner.

Features:

  • Streamlined stat-raising gameplay

  • Lighthearted dating sim elements

  • Several unlockable scenes

  • A satirical take on competition and ambition

data.short_description: Adult-Only Stat Raising Management Dating Sim. Train your furry goat friend in the art of giving head, win the title of Throat Goat and a trip to Hawaii!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: any x86_64 CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics with full Vulkan 1.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux distribution released after 2016
  • 處理器: x86_64 CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics with full Vulkan 1.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
